elements.title: lang::report_page_052_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_waiting.*
FROM (
       SELECT CONCAT('assign-', kbi_s.id) AS id,
              kbi_c.id                   AS courseid,
              kbi_c.fullname             AS course,
              kbi_cm.id                  AS cmid,
              kbi_a.id                   AS activityid,
              kbi_a.name                 AS activity_name,
              'assign'                   AS activity_type,
              kbi_u.id                   AS userid,
              kbi_u.firstname,
              kbi_u.lastname,
              kbi_u.email,
              kbi_a.duedate,
              kbi_s.timemodified         AS submitted_at,
              kbi_g.timemodified         AS graded_at,
              NULL                       AS slot,
              NULL                       AS attemptid,
              NULL                       AS question_name,
              kbi_teachers.teacher_names AS teachers
       FROM mdl_assign_submission kbi_s
              JOIN mdl_assign kbi_a ON kbi_a.id = kbi_s.assignment
              JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_a.course
              JOIN mdl_modules kbi_m ON kbi_m.name = 'assign'
              JOIN mdl_course_modules kbi_cm ON kbi_cm.course = kbi_c.id
                    AND kbi_cm.module = kbi_m.id
                    AND kbi_cm.instance = kbi_a.id
              JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_s.userid
              JOIN mdl_enrol kbi_e ON kbi_e.courseid = kbi_c.id
              JOIN mdl_user_enrolments kbi_ue ON kbi_ue.enrolid = kbi_e.id AND kbi_ue.userid = kbi_u.id
              LEFT JOIN mdl_assign_grades kbi_g ON kbi_g.assignment = kbi_s.assignment
                    AND kbi_g.userid = kbi_s.userid
                    AND kbi_g.attemptnumber = kbi_s.attemptnumber
              LEFT JOIN (
                    SELECT kbi_ctx.instanceid AS courseid,
                           GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(kbi_t.firstname, ' ', kbi_t.lastname) ORDER BY kbi_t.lastname, kbi_t.firstname SEPARATOR ', ') AS teacher_names
                    FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
                           JOIN mdl_role kbi_r ON kbi_r.id = kbi_ra.roleid AND kbi_r.shortname IN ('editingteacher', 'teacher')
                           JOIN mdl_user kbi_t ON kbi_t.id = kbi_ra.userid
                           JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
                    WHERE kbi_t.deleted = 0
                      AND kbi_t.suspended = 0
                    GROUP BY kbi_ctx.instanceid
              ) kbi_teachers ON kbi_teachers.courseid = kbi_c.id
       WHERE kbi_s.latest = 1
         AND kbi_s.status = 'submitted'
         AND (kbi_g.id IS NULL OR kbi_g.grade IS NULL OR kbi_g.grade < 0 OR kbi_s.timemodified > COALESCE(kbi_g.timemodified, 0))
         AND kbi_c.visible = 1
         AND kbi_cm.visible = 1
         AND kbi_e.status = 0
         AND kbi_ue.status = 0
         AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
         AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
         AND kbi_u.username <> 'guest'

       UNION ALL

       SELECT CONCAT('quiz-', kbi_qa.id, '-', kbi_qatt.id) AS id,
              kbi_c.id                                    AS courseid,
              kbi_c.fullname                              AS course,
              kbi_cm.id                                   AS cmid,
              kbi_qz.id                                   AS activityid,
              kbi_qz.name                                 AS activity_name,
              'quiz'                                      AS activity_type,
              kbi_u.id                                    AS userid,
              kbi_u.firstname,
              kbi_u.lastname,
              kbi_u.email,
              kbi_qz.timeclose                            AS duedate,
              kbi_qa.timefinish                           AS submitted_at,
              NULL                                        AS graded_at,
              kbi_qatt.slot                               AS slot,
              kbi_qa.id                                   AS attemptid,
              kbi_q.name                                  AS question_name,
              kbi_teachers.teacher_names                  AS teachers
       FROM mdl_quiz_attempts kbi_qa
              JOIN mdl_quiz kbi_qz ON kbi_qz.id = kbi_qa.quiz
              JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_qz.course
              JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_qa.userid
              JOIN mdl_question_attempts kbi_qatt ON kbi_qatt.questionusageid = kbi_qa.uniqueid
              JOIN mdl_question kbi_q ON kbi_q.id = kbi_qatt.questionid
              JOIN mdl_question_attempt_steps kbi_qas ON kbi_qas.questionattemptid = kbi_qatt.id
                    AND kbi_qas.sequencenumber = (
                        SELECT MAX(kbi_qas2.sequencenumber)
                        FROM mdl_question_attempt_steps kbi_qas2
                        WHERE kbi_qas2.questionattemptid = kbi_qatt.id
                    )
              JOIN mdl_modules kbi_m ON kbi_m.name = 'quiz'
              JOIN mdl_course_modules kbi_cm ON kbi_cm.course = kbi_c.id
                    AND kbi_cm.module = kbi_m.id
                    AND kbi_cm.instance = kbi_qz.id
              JOIN mdl_enrol kbi_e ON kbi_e.courseid = kbi_c.id
              JOIN mdl_user_enrolments kbi_ue ON kbi_ue.enrolid = kbi_e.id AND kbi_ue.userid = kbi_u.id
              LEFT JOIN (
                    SELECT kbi_ctx.instanceid AS courseid,
                           GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(kbi_t.firstname, ' ', kbi_t.lastname) ORDER BY kbi_t.lastname, kbi_t.firstname SEPARATOR ', ') AS teacher_names
                    FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
                           JOIN mdl_role kbi_r ON kbi_r.id = kbi_ra.roleid AND kbi_r.shortname IN ('editingteacher', 'teacher')
                           JOIN mdl_user kbi_t ON kbi_t.id = kbi_ra.userid
                           JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
                    WHERE kbi_t.deleted = 0
                      AND kbi_t.suspended = 0
                    GROUP BY kbi_ctx.instanceid
              ) kbi_teachers ON kbi_teachers.courseid = kbi_c.id
       WHERE kbi_qa.preview = 0
         AND kbi_qa.state = 'finished'
         AND kbi_qas.state = 'needsgrading'
         AND kbi_c.visible = 1
         AND kbi_cm.visible = 1
         AND kbi_e.status = 0
         AND kbi_ue.status = 0
         AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
         AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
         AND kbi_u.username <> 'guest'
) kbi_waiting
ORDER BY kbi_waiting.course, kbi_waiting.activity_name, kbi_waiting.submitted_at DESC
